title: Proclamation No. 312, s. 1967
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 312

RESERVING FOR GOVERNMENT OFFICE BUILDING SITE PURPOSES CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN OF THE GOVERNMENT, FORMERLY KNOWN AS FORT SAN PEDRO, SITUATED IN THE CITY OF ILOILO, ISLAND OF ILOILO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for building site purposes of the various government offices hereunder mentioned, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to future survey, certain portions of the private domain of the Government, formerly known as Fort San Pedro, situated in the City of Iloilo, Island of Iloilo, which portions are more particularly described as follows:

Lot 1051-C (Under the administration of the National Bureau of Invest- igation)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 1051-C, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the SE., along lines 1-2, by Proposed Road; on the SW., along line 2-3, by Fort San Pedro Drive; on the NW., along line 3-4, by portions of Fort San Pedro (Lands); and on the NE., along line 4-1, by Proposed Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 31 deg. 21′ E., 60.00 m. to point 2; thence N. 64 deg. 24′ W., 42.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 31 deg. 42′ E., 84.35 m. to point 4; thence S. 32 deg. 39′ E., 45.93 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of THREE THOUSAND (3,000) Square Meters.

Lot 1051-D (Under the administration of the Philippine Constabulary)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 1051-D, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Proposed Road; on the SE., along lines 2-3-4, by Fort San Pedro Drive; and on the SW., NW., and NE., along lines 4-5-6-1, by Proposed Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 61 deg. 30′ E., 148.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 14 deg. 05′ W., 65.00 m. to point 3; thence S. 10 deg. 15′ W., 130.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 60 deg. 00′ W., 369.00 m. to point 5; thence N. 33 deg. 45′ E., 190.00 m. to point 6; thence S. 56 deg. 00′ E., 148.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of SIXTY FIVE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED TWELVE (65,712) Square Meters.

Lot 2 (Under the administration of the Bureau of Plant Industry)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Fort San Pedro Drive; on the SE., and SW., along lines 2-3-4, by Proposed Road; and on the NW., along lines 4-5-6-1, by Lot 1 (BPH Motor Pool). Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan.

thence S. 51 deg. 35′ E., 23.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 34 deg. 00′ W., 143.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 54 deg. 50′ W., 32.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 36 deg. 40′ E., 50.00 m. to point 5; thence S. 80 deg. 45′ E., 4.00 m. to point 6; thence N. 35 deg. 00′ E., 93.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of THREE THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED NINETY ONE (3,891) Square Meters.

Lot 3 (Under the administration of the National Waterworks and Sewerage Authority)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 3, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by Lot 5 (FORESTRY); on the SW., and NW., along lines 2-3-4-5, by Proposed Road; on the NE., along line 5-6, by Fort San Pedro Drive; and on the SE., and NE., along lines 6-7-1, by Lot 4 of plan Igplan-V-13 (Iloilo Pilot’s Ass.). Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 37 deg. 05′ W., 40.00 m. to point 2; thence N. 61 deg. 00′ W., 8.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 55 deg. 45′ W., 36.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 34 deg. 15′ E., 63.00 m. to point 5; thence N. 52 deg. 15′ E., 27.00 m. to point 6; thence S. 38 deg. 10′ W., 20.00 m. to point 7; thence S. 54 deg. 10′ E., 18.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an area of TWO THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED SIXTY SEVEN (2,467) Square Maters.

Lot 5 (Under the administration of the Bureau of Forestry)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 5, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the NW., along line 1-2, by Lot 4 of plan Igpla-V-13 (Iloilo Pilot Ass.); on the NE., along line 2-3, by Fort San Pedro Drive; on the SE., along line 3-4, by Lot 6 (Commission on Agricultural Productivity); on the SW., along line 4-5, by Proposed Road; and on the NW., along line 5-1, by Lot 3 (NAWASA). Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence N. 37 deg. 05′ E., 20.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 52 deg. 15′ E., 40.00 m. to point 3; thence S. 37 deg. 15′ W., 53.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 61 deg. 00′ W., 40.00 m. to point 5; thence N. 37 deg. 05′ E., 40.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of TWO THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED NINETY TWO (2,392) Square Meters.

Lot 6 (Under the administration of the Commission on Agricultural Productivity)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 6, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2, by Proposed Road; on the NW., along line 2-3, by Lot 5 (Bureau of Forestry); and on the NE, and E., along lines 2-3-4-5-6-7-8-9-1, by Fort San Pedro Drive. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence N. 61 deg. 00′ W., 70.00 m. to point 2; thence N. 37 deg. 15′ E., 53.00 m. to point 3; thence S. 49 deg. 45′ E., 13.00 m. to point 4; thence S. 42 deg. 45′ E., 12.00 m. to point 5; thence S. 37 deg. 40′ E., 13.00 m. to point 6; thence S. 25 deg. 00′ E., 10.00 m. to point 7; thence S. 4 deg. 30′ E., 13.00 m. to point 8; thence S. 0 deg. 30′ E., 13.00 m. to point 9; thence S. 7 deg. 00′ W., 17.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of TWO THOUSAND SIX HUNDRED FORTY THREE (2,643) Square Meters.

Lot 7 (Under the administration of the Bureau of Soils)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 7, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), Situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by Fort San Pedro Drive; on the SW., along line 2-3, by Proposed Road; on the NW., along line 3-4, by Lot 7-A (PACD); and on the NE., along line 4-1, by Proposed Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 14 deg. 10′ W., 62.00 m. to point 2; thence N. 61 deg. 45′ W., 30.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 12 deg. 15′ E., 62.00 m. to point 4; thence S. 63 deg. 10′ E., 33.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of ONE THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED NINETY ONE (1,891) Square Meters.

Lot 7-A (Under the Administration of the Presidential Arm on Community Development)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 7-A, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Proposed Road; on the SE., along line 2-3, by Lot 7 (Bureau of Soils); on the SW., along line 3-4, by Proposed Road; and on the NW., along line 4-1, by Lot 8 (Bureau of Lands). Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 63 deg. 10′ E., 28.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 12 deg. 15′ W., 62.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 61 deg. 45′ W., 35.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 19 deg. 40′ E., 60.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of ONE THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED NINETY EIGHT (1,998) Square Meters.

Lot 8 (Under the administration of the Bureau of Lands)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 8, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by Lot 7-A (PACD); on the SW., alone line 2-3, by Proposed Road; on the NW., along line 3-4, by Lot 9 (Bureau of Animal Industry); and on the NE., along line 4-l, by Proposed Road, Beginning at point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 19 deg. 40′ W., 60.00 m. to point 2; thence N. 61 deg. 45′ W., 37.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 26 deg. 15′ E., 58.00 m. to point 4; thence S. 63 deg. 10′ E., 30.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of ONE THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED NINETY EIGHT (1,998) Square Meters.

Lot 9 (Under the administration of the Bureau of Animal Industry)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 9, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Proposed Road; on the SE., along line 2-3, by Lot 8 (BUREAU OF LANDS); on the SW., along line 3-4, by Proposed Road; and on the NW., along line 4-1, by Lot 10 (BPH & BPW); Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 58 deg. 15′ E., 35.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 26 deg. 15′ W., 58.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 61 deg. 45′ W., 40.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 31 deg. 10′ E., 60.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of TWO THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED EIGHTY (2,280) Square Meters.

Lot 10 (Under the administration of the Bureau of Public Works and Bureau of Public Highways)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 10, being a portion of Fort San Pedro Park), situated in Iloilo City. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by Lot 9 (Bureau of Animal Industry); and on the SW., NW. and NE., along lines 2-3-4-1, by Proposed Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached Sketch Plan,

thence S. 31 deg. 10′ W., 60.00 m. to point 2; thence N. 55 deg. 00′ W., 40.00 m. to point 3; thence N. 34 deg. 15′ W., 60.00 m. to point 4; thence S. 58 deg. 15′ E., 38.00 m. to the point of

beginning; containing an approximate area of TWO THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED NINETY ONE (2,291) Square Meters.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 8th day of December, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-seven.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) RAFAEL M. SALAS Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
